The gradle-wrapper.jar file must be committed to this repo.
It is generated by running `gradle wrapper` in the android/ directory on your local machine
(requires Gradle installed locally), or by copying it from any other React Native 0.73 project.

The binary jar file is ~60 KB and is safe to commit to git.
It is required for GitHub Actions CI to build without a pre-installed Gradle.

To generate it locally:
  cd android
  gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.3
